title: Atelier LSP install audit record
description: One record per `Event::RequestLspInstall` → `Event::LspInstallResolved` round-trip. Spec §7 (Verification) line: LSP first-use install requires explicit user approval; the audit row is the durable evidence of which language was prompted, which packages were considered, and what the user chose. Lives in the same on-disk `audit.log` as `subprocess_egress.v1.json` / `mcp_egress.v1.json` / `egress.v1.json`, discriminated by `kind`. Path: `<workspace>/.atelier/sessions/<uuid>/audit.log`.

kind.description: Discriminator. Distinct from `subprocess-egress`, `mcp-http-request`, and `model-call` rows sharing the same `audit.log`.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at the moment the install attempt resolved (matches the `Event::LspInstallResolved` emission, not the preceding `Event::RequestLspInstall`).

language.description: The LSP language identifier (e.g. `typescript`, `python`, `rust`). Stable lowercase identifier — matches the `language` field carried on `Event::RequestLspInstall`. v60.36 H5 — capped at 64 bytes.

candidate_packages.description: The packages the install flow proposed. For TypeScript today: `["typescript-language-server"]`. Multiple entries when a language requires several packages (e.g. python: `pyright` alongside `python-lsp-server`). v60.36 H5 — capped at 16 items × 256 bytes.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock milliseconds from `Event::RequestLspInstall` to `Event::LspInstallResolved`. For `declined`, the time the user took to dismiss the prompt; for `installed`, the install-subprocess duration; for `already_present`, the version-probe duration; for `failed`, the time to the error surface.

package_manager.description: The package manager the launcher used. Optional — older artifacts may pre-date the field. `system` is the catch-all when the launcher delegated to a platform-specific path (apt, dnf, choco).

version_installed.description: The package version actually installed, when `outcome` is `installed` or `already_present`. Free-form (e.g. `typescript-language-server@4.3.4`). Omitted otherwise. v60.36 H5 — capped at 256 bytes.

reason.description: Free-form diagnostic note. For `declined`: the dismissal reason if the UI captured one (otherwise omitted). For `failed`: short error category (`network`, `permission`, `unsupported-platform`, `package-manager-missing`). Omitted otherwise. Capped at 1 KiB so a malformed row can't bloat the audit log.

LspInstallOutcome.description: Stable wire labels from `atelier_core::lsp::LspInstallOutcome::wire_label()`. Pinned by `lsp_install_outcome_wire_labels_are_stable`.
